claim: Apply the analogical structure in atom ATOM_T013_S002_ANA_04 ("like that and so I think it was kind of like I think this framing was a lot m...") to the open problem framed in atom ATOM_T002_S010_OPE_01 ("What's even more amazing is there is this problem that is an open problem in ...").
